narrative:
Jefferson / Nellie / New Castle / Warsaw (precinct in Coshocton County) has 1,237 registered voters, with 51.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.1 percentage points.
